items.line_en: I used to have a hard time paying attention, so I'd draw.

coach.say: I used to have a hard time paying attention, so I'd draw.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I used to have a hard time paying attention, / so I'd draw.

items.line_en: But one day, my teacher said we were going to make a movie.

coach.say: But one day, my teacher said we were going to make a movie.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But one day, / my teacher said we were going to make a movie.

items.line_en: And since I like art, I could have handmade.

coach.say: And since I like art, I could have handmade.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And since I like art, / I could have handmade.

items.line_en: All the kids had different roles, lots of good things to say about my storyboards.

coach.say: All the kids had different roles, lots of good things to say about my storyboards.
coach.hint: Chunk it: All the kids had different roles, / lots of good things to say about my storyboards.

items.line_en: We all made decisions and did everything together as a team.

coach.say: We all made decisions and did everything together as a team.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We all made decisions and / did everything together as a team.

items.line_en: The movie was a big hit, and it made a lot of money too.

coach.say: The movie was a big hit, and it made a lot of money too.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The movie was a big hit, / and it made a lot of money too.

items.line_en: Maybe someday I'll win an Academy Award.

coach.say: Maybe someday I'll win an Academy Award.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Maybe someday I'll win an Academy Award.
Chunk it: I've always liked to lead.

items.line_en: But now after doing this, bro, I can see myself being a leader in business someday.

coach.say: But now after doing this, bro, I can see myself being a leader in business someday.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But now after doing this, / bro, / I can see myself being a leader in business someday.

items.line_en: In class we learned manufacturing, marketing, and I even got to pitch our business plan to venture capitalist.

coach.say: In class we learned manufacturing, marketing, and I even got to pitch our business plan to venture capitalist.
coach.hint: Chunk it: In class we learned manufacturing, / marketing, / and I even got to pitch our business plan to venture capitalist.

items.line_en: Our team's hard work really paid off, and we were able to secure a business loan from the bank.

coach.say: Our team's hard work really paid off, and we were able to secure a business loan from the bank.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Our team's hard work really paid off, / and we were able to secure a business loan from the bank.

items.line_en: It bringing business into the classroom has changed the path of our lives.

coach.say: It bringing business into the classroom has changed the path of our lives.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It bringing business into the classroom has changed the path of our lives.

items.line_en: Imagine what it would do for kids all over the world.

coach.say: Imagine what it would do for kids all over the world.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Imagine what it would do for kids all over the world.
